description: Pulmonary-focused early questioning. Onset, productive cough, dyspnea, and fever come first.
source: Adapted from Phase 2 plan §8.2 Condition A for pneumonia presentation
questions: Hello, I'm your doctor today. Can you tell me what brought you to the ED?
Are you having a cough, and if so, are you bringing up any phlegm?
Are you having shortness of breath, fever, or chills right now?
Have your symptoms been getting worse, staying the same, or coming and going?
Do you have any chest pain, especially when you take a deep breath or cough?
